hotel_name: Grand Hyatt Al Khobar Hotel and Residences
raw_description:
Elegant Accommodations:Grand Hyatt Al Khobar Hotel and Residences in Al Khobar offers luxurious rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Guests enjoy free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and comfortable seating areas.Exceptional Facilities:The hotel features a spa and wellness centre, indoor swimming pool, fitness centre, sauna, and hot tub. Additional facilities include a terrace, steam room, and beauty services.Dining Experience:A family-friendly restaurant serves French, Middle Eastern, Asian, and international cuisines. Dining options include brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea, accommodating halal, vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free diets.Prime Location:Located less than 1 km from Al Rashid Mall and 48 km from King Fahd International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Al Khobar Corniche (9 km) and Sunset Marina (23 km).

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.3for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Grand Hyatt Al Khobar Hotel and Residences. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Private parking.
